pi_items.source: Matches the hypothetical emergency scenario described in task files
Subjective benchmark metric without objective verification criteria

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the Muncie.b04 HEC-RAS boundary condition file to include a synthetic triangular dam-break hydrograph with a peak breach outflow of 45,000 cfs (target must be within 10% tolerance). A standard 21,000 cfs simulation results in a peak water surface elevation (WSE) of 953.84 ft; the correct dam breach simulation must yield a physically plausible peak WSE strictly greater than 953.84 ft and less than 980.0 ft. The agent must extract 4 metrics (PEAK_BREACH_FLOW_CFS, PEAK_WSE_FT, MEAN_PEAK_WSE_FT, PEAK_WSE_TIMESTEP_MIN) from the updated Muncie.p04.hdf output file and write them to a report file, along with a narrative summary paragraph of at least 30 words. O*NET code 17-2051.00 accurately maps to Civil Engineers.
